ranking_criteria.locality: Prefer small, localized diffs (1-2 lines ideal)
ranking_criteria.semantic_clarity: Prefer clear bug semantics (off-by-one, wrong operator, missing check)
ranking_criteria.testability: Prefer bugs in code covered by existing proptest tests
ranking_criteria.diversity: Balance mutation types across data structures

ranked.rationale: Perfect expression-level off-by-one (index vs index-1) in btree range iteration. 1 line core change. OrdMap has extensive proptest coverage. Classic PBT-catchable bug.
Single keyword change (if→while) in RRB index lookup. Extremely localized. Vector has proptest coverage. Bug manifests on specific tree shapes.
Operator precedence bug — missing parens in boolean expression. Affects both ptr_eq and PartialEq. Clear semantics, 2 identical sites. Vector has proptest.
Variable scope bug in quicksort — declaration moved inside loop. 2-line change. Sort has dedicated proptest (test_quicksort). Very clear semantics.
Side effect inside debug_assert — pop_front only runs in debug builds. Subtle but expression-level. 3-line fix. Affects RRB tree splitting.
Missing fallback in eq for single-chunk Vectors. Small change (5 lines added). Vector equality has proptest coverage.
Wrong condition ordering in btree removal — PullUp vs Steal priority. 12 lines, but logically clear. OrdMap has proptest.
Missing overflow checks (checked_pow). 3 sites, 25 lines. Only triggers on very deep trees. Lower priority.
Structural rewrite of remove_index match arms. 40 lines. Expressible but complex encoding for marauders.
Multiple overflow guard sites. Only triggers on pathological inputs. Low mutation value.
Algorithmic change (randomized pivot). Changes function signature. Hard to express as mutation.
New backtracking logic — adds control flow that didn't exist. Not a simple mutation.
Enum variant change + 118 lines. Too structural for marauders.
